LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF ASSET CAPITAL RECOVERY GROUP, LLC'S MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO WRITTEN STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. COUNSEL FOR ASSET IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTIONS OF THE COURT'S RULING. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR., CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, TORREANOM@AOL.COM, REPORTED. (D302/RBU)

Off Calendar Aug-08-2018 Off Calendar

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-12-2018 Continued To Aug-14-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Written Stipulation Of All Parties; Statement Of Facts; And Declaration Of John P. Kenosian
Off Calendar Mar-05-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ASSET CAPITAL RECOVERY GROUP, LLC's Motion For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Written Stipulation Of All Parties.

Asset's motion for entry of judgment pursuant to stipulation is GRANTED. No opposition filed.

Counsel for Asset is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portions of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. (D302/RBU)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Written Stipulation Of All Parties

MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ASSET CAPITAL RECOVERY GROUP, LLC's Motion For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Written Stipulation Of All Parties is Off calendar for failure to comply with the CCP Sec. 1005 notice requirements. Judge: Charlene P. Kiesselbach, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. =(302/CPK)
